name: Heavenly Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add 6 tablespoons of sugar, beating after each addition until stiff and glossy.
3. Add vanilla extract and continue to beat.
4. Gently fold in the remaining sugar using a spatula or whisk.
5. Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 250°F (125°C) for 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. The batter forms about 18-20 kisses on the cookie sheet.
